category_sources: Official MMIX sources page describes MMIXware sources, simulator, assembler, and related tools.
source_facts.description: 64-bit RISC architecture designed by Donald Knuth.
display_name_sources: Official MMIX site uses the project name MMIX.
docs_sources: Official MMIX documentation pages provide the architecture and instruction documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official MMIX site.
repo_sources: Official MMIX Sources page says the latest MMIXware sources are browsable at https://gitlab.lrz.de/mmix/mmixware and cloneable with Git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MMIX as a 64-bit RISC architecture designed by Donald Knuth.
source_facts.executables include mmix, mmixal, mmmix, and mmotype.
